data.description: US senate kills bill that would mean Trump would need congressional approval for President Donald Trump to carry out further military attacks on Venezuela, with all votes counted. The vote ended 50-50 but Vance broke the tie to kill the bill

data.title: Bluerock High Income Institutional Credit Fund declares 9.0% Q4 2025 distribution, 14th consecutive quarterly payout.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, the Bluerock High Income Institutional Credit Fund, known as the High Income Fund with tickers IIMAX, IIMCX, IIMWX, declared its fourteenth consecutive quarterly distribution. The distribution resulted in a 9.0% current annualized distribution rate.

data.title: Hyundai Palisade wins 2026 North American Utility Vehicle of the Year award for its hybrid and ICE powertrain lineup.
data.description: The recently released PALISADE has been recognized by the NACTOY jury as the Car, Utility, and Truck of the Year. This prestigious award highlights the exceptional features of the flagship three-row SUV, including its hybrid and ICE powertrain options. The vehicle is also commended for its spacious interior, superior to others in its class, and its advanced safety technologies.

data.title: Restrictive tariffs by Trump on non-US semiconductors for increased revenue while delaying decision on higher industry taxes.
data.description: Tariffs have been imposed, granting President Trump a percentage from Nvidia's chip sales in China. This move also delays the implementation of increased taxes on the chip sector.

data.title: Markets volatile after all-time highs as Trump criticizes Fed, inflation at 2.7%. Risk of market reacting to political comments. Fed independence at stake.
data.description: The markets are experiencing volatility despite reaching all-time highs, triggered by renewed political pressure on Federal Reserve decisions. Donald Trump has criticized the Fed for raising rates, arguing that lower rates should be justified by robust economic growth, not tighter policies. The concern lies not in the criticism, but in the potential impact on market confidence if these remarks are interpreted as actionable directives, potentially compromising Fed independence. Inflation remains stable with the latest Consumer Price Index (CPI) at 2.7%, meeting expectations.更多内容请访问Benzinga.com。

data.title: BigBear.ai converts $125 million 6.00% Convertible Senior Secured Notes due 2029 into common stock, strengthening balance sheet.
data.description: BigBear.ai, a prominent provider of AI solutions for national security, revealed the successful conversion of its outstanding $125 million 6.00% Convertible Senior Secured Notes due 2029. This move has enhanced the company's balance sheet and capital structure by exchanging the Notes for shares of its common stock. The conversion aims to consolidate the company's financial position and pave the way for potential growth opportunities in the future.

data.title: Sui operational again after 6-hour downtime disrupting transactions with no clarity on the cause from Sui Foundation.
data.description: The network outage on the Sui platform, despite a remedy by Sui core developers, has not been explained by the Sui Foundation. The Foundation has not disclosed information regarding the cause of the outage, despite efforts made by developers to address the issue.

data.title: $17B lost in 2025 due to AI-driven crypto scams, says Chainalysis. Scams are becoming more efficient and lucrative.
data.description: According to a recent study by Chainalysis, it has been revealed that artificial intelligence-driven cryptocurrency scams are proving to be more effective, lucrative, and challenging to combat. The study highlighted a significant increase in the efficiency and profitability of such scams when compared to conventional methods, thus necessitating enhanced efforts in thwarting these illicit activities.
